---
title: "weather_variable_visuals"
output: md_document
date: "2026-02-03"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


# Scraping Capacity Numbers from Wikipedia

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(corrplot)
delay <- read.csv("core_2015_2024.csv")
```

```{r}
# categorical variables
delay$Sun.Belt <- factor(delay$Sun.Belt, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("Non-Sun Belt", "Sun Belt"))
delay$Configuration <- factor(delay$Configuration)
delay$Crosswind <- factor(delay$Crosswind, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("No", "Yes"))

# Y variables
ggplot(delay, aes(x = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 25) +
  labs(title = "Weather Delays")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Weather.cancel)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 25) +
  labs(title = "Weather Cancellations")

# X variables
ggplot(delay, aes(x = Sun.Belt)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(title = "Sun Belt")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Runways)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Runways")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Configuration)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(title = "Runway Configuration")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Crosswind)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(title = "Crosswind")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = VMC.Max.Capacity)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 25) +
  labs(title = "VMC Max Capacity")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Gates)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 25) +
  labs(title = "Gates")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Perc.Visible)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 25) +
  labs(title = "Percent Visible")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Lost.Capacity.Visibility)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 25) +
  labs(title = "Lost Capacity from Visibility")



# Y vs X: Weather.Delays
ggplot(delay, aes(x = Sun.Belt, y = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Weather Delays vs Sun Belt")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Runways, y = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Delays vs Runways")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Configuration, y = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Weather Delays vs Configuration")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Crosswind, y = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Weather Delays vs Crosswind")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = VMC.Max.Capacity, y = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Delays vs VMC Capacity")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Gates, y = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Delays vs Gates")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Perc.Visible, y = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Delays vs Percent Visible")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Lost.Capacity.Visibility, y = Weather.Delays)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Delays vs Lost Capacity")



# Y vs X: Weather.cancel
ggplot(delay, aes(x = Sun.Belt, y = Weather.cancel)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Weather Cancellations vs Sun Belt")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Runways, y = Weather.cancel)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Cancellations vs Runways")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Configuration, y = Weather.cancel)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Weather Cancellations vs Configuration")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Crosswind, y = Weather.cancel)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Weather Cancellations vs Crosswind")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = VMC.Max.Capacity, y = Weather.cancel)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Cancellations vs VMC Capacity")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Gates, y = Weather.cancel)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Cancellations vs Gates")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Perc.Visible, y = Weather.cancel)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Cancellations vs Percent Visible")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Lost.Capacity.Visibility, y = Weather.cancel)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Weather Cancellations vs Lost Capacity")



# X vs X interactions
ggplot(delay, aes(x = Runways, y = Gates)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Runways vs Gates")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Runways, y = VMC.Max.Capacity)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Runways vs VMC Capacity")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Gates, y = VMC.Max.Capacity)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Gates vs VMC Capacity")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Perc.Visible, y = Lost.Capacity.Visibility)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Percent Visible vs Lost Capacity")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Configuration, y = VMC.Max.Capacity)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "VMC Capacity vs Configuration")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Crosswind, y = VMC.Max.Capacity)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "VMC Capacity vs Crosswind")

ggplot(delay, aes(x = Sun.Belt, y = Gates)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Gates vs Sun Belt")





# correlation matrix for numeric X variables
x_num <- delay %>%
  select(Runways, VMC.Max.Capacity, Gates, Perc.Visible, Lost.Capacity.Visibility)

cor_mat <- cor(x_num, use = "complete.obs")
corrplot(cor_mat, method = "circle")
```
